title: Mohdel curated.json
description: Schema for ~/.config/mohdel/curated.json — see docs/CATALOG.md for the full reference.

propertyNames.description: Model id in the form '<provider>/<model>'. Underscore-prefixed keys (like '_comment') are allowed for inline notes.

oneOf.description: Inline comment value for underscore-prefixed keys.

deprecatedStub.description: Redirect from a retired model id to its replacement.

modelEntry.description: A real model entry. 'model', 'creator', and 'inputFormat' are required.

model.description: Literal model id sent to the provider's API.

provider.description: Routing provider. Defaults to the provider segment of the catalog key.

sdk.description: SDK adapter to use (some providers require this).

inputPrice.description: USD per 1M input tokens. Object form is for tiered pricing — must include a 'default' key.

thinkingPrice.description: USD per 1M thinking/reasoning tokens (when the provider bills these separately).

cacheWritePrice.description: USD per 1M tokens written to provider-side prompt cache.

cacheReadPrice.description: USD per 1M tokens served from provider-side prompt cache.

thinkingTokenLimit.description: Maximum thinking tokens per call (when separate from output).

tokenizerHeadroom.description: Multiplier applied to local token estimates to account for tokenizer drift.

oneOf.description: Map effort name → provider-native budget. Standard names: low/medium/high/xhigh/max/none.

defaultThinkingEffort.description: Effort level used when the envelope omits 'outputEffort'.

tags.description: Free-form classification tags (used by 'mo bench --tag', 'mo rank', and caller-side selection).

aliases.description: Alternative ids that should resolve to this entry.

replaces.description: Older model ids this one supersedes.

supportsTools.description: Set false to mark a model as tool-less.

imageDefaultSize.description: Default size when envelope omits one (e.g. '1024x1024').

rpmLimit.description: Requests per minute. Overrides provider default.

tpmLimit.description: Tokens per minute. Overrides provider default.

rateLimitScope.description: 'model' = private budget. 'provider' = shared with provider-level pool.

deprecated.description: If present, this entry is treated as a stub (use 'deprecatedStub' shape).

suspended.description: Reason this model is temporarily disabled.
